rows.Control_Description: Centralized declaration of scenario/distribution/signal parameters with controlled updates and reproducible intent register
rows.Notes: Architecture centralizes parameter control but approval workflow and signatory controls are operator-managed

rows.Control_Description: Parameter changes are isolated to TOML and can be reviewed as discrete configuration diffs
rows.Notes: Supports traceability; formal change authorization requires external process

rows.Control_Description: Preflight enforces runtime prerequisites and config parseability before execution to reduce uncontrolled runtime variance
Beta parameterized stress engine is deterministic under CFG runtime seed and auditable at run level
rows.Notes: Formal validation testing and challenger benchmarking not yet codified

rows.Control_Reference: Stress Calibration and Tail Risk Capture
rows.Control_Description: Power-law tail construction addresses non-linear jump risk under counterparty and hyperinflation scenarios
No external network dependency at runtime supports continuity in disconnected environments
rows.Evidence_Type: Runtime dependency manifest + offline execution evidence
rows.Notes: Validated runtime manifest custody and release governance are external

rows.Control_Description: Terminal-native offline operation aligns with isolated environment execution requirements
rows.Notes: Control satisfaction depends on operator enclave configuration

rows.Control_Reference: CC6.6 Logical and Procedural Access to Change Execution
rows.Control_Description: Single entry-point run orchestration limits ad hoc stage bypass and supports controlled execution path
rows.Notes: Access controls around execution host are outside repository scope

rows.Control_Description: Jump-risk oriented stress regime supports severe tail scenario evaluation where linear assumptions understate risk
rows.Notes: Formal linkage to desk-level FRTB governance requires operator framework mapping

rows.Control_Reference: Assumption Governance and Liability Boundary Control
rows.Control_Description: Liability stack assumptions are TOML-governed and explicitly stress-adjusted under hyperinflation to surface headroom breach risk
rows.Notes: Requires documented owner and approval process for payout-rate and inflation assumptions

rows.Control_Description: Terminal-native capital stack summary and color-coded chart provide consistent scenario-level operational visibility for escalation decisions
rows.Notes: Escalation ownership and notification workflow remain external governance controls

rows.Control_Description: Stress-conditioned DCF engine links scenario recoveries to valuation erosion and impairment signaling for model outcomes analysis
rows.Evidence_Type: Scenario valuation output + impairment signal evidence
rows.Notes: Threshold ownership and validation cadence require committee governance

rows.Control_Description: M&A screen formalizes acquisition decision thresholds under stress and captures review/pass triggers for near-threshold outcomes
rows.Evidence_Type: Scenario screening output + threshold config evidence
rows.Notes: Acquisition override workflow and approvals remain operator-managed

rows.Control_Description: LBO stress module evaluates DSCR and stressed IRR viability under scenario-conditioned exit values to expose leverage fragility
rows.Notes: Calibration linkage to desk governance and leverage policy remains external

rows.Control_Description: IRR attribution module decomposes return drivers and recomputes stressed IRR per scenario for monitoring against floor and target thresholds
rows.Evidence_Type: IRR attribution artifacts + stressed signal evidence
rows.Notes: Target/floor governance and monitoring escalation remain external

rows.Control_Description: Derivation and runtime implementation are documented from replicating-portfolio PDE basis with explicit risk-neutral drift elimination
rows.Notes: Empirical volatility calibration remains operator owned

rows.Control_Description: Discrete replication error simulation provides internal validation lens for option-adjusted solvency headroom resilience
rows.Notes: Continuous-trading and liquidity assumptions are not fully valid in private credit

rows.Control_Description: Structured review checklist mapping validation criteria to notebook cells, source documents, and evidence artefacts.
rows.Notes: Section 8 contains operator-owned evidence requirements outside repository boundary.
